title: Ishaq Dar Says Pakistan Keeping Talks Alive After US Declares Negotiations Failed
snippet: Pakistan FM/DPM Ishaq Dar: 'imperative that parties continue to uphold ceasefire commitment.' Pakistan will try to facilitate new round of dialogue. Diplomatic efforts between Washington and Tehran far from over.
tag_reason: New Pakistani diplomatic response. First appearance of Ishaq Dar as key mediator figure urging continued dialogue.
